guardduty.filter.condition.Eq.Docs: Represents the equal condition to apply to a single field when querying for findings.

guardduty.filter.condition.Gte.Docs: Represents the greater than or equal condition to apply to a single field when querying for findings.

guardduty.filter.condition.Lt.Docs: Represents the less than condition to apply to a single field when querying for findings.

guardduty.filter.condition.Lte.Docs: Represents the less than or equal condition to apply to a single field when querying for findings.

guardduty.filter.condition.Neq.Docs: Represents the not equal condition to apply to a single field when querying for findings.
